title: DrDonut's Fan Pack
body:
**This is not an official DrDonut Texturepack!**

IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO DOWNLOAD DRDONUT'S OFFICIAL PACK JOIN HIS DISCORD [HERE](https://discord.gg/eHNNj4KMaE)
![Title Image For DrDonut's Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/imXaGAqI/images/ad637d1135b6f412eb161b8c9b0b3cafd707ca3c.gif)

## A Pack For DrDonut

Features:
1. Basic Crystal PvP Textures
2. No Explosion Sounds
3. A blue themed gui to match DrDonut's blue theme


**This is not an official DrDonut Texturepack!**
